channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-05-12
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ESMA identifies areas for further supervisory convergence on compliance and internal audit in the funds sector 11/05/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: Central bank Governors appointed to lead BIS Board and key groups
item.description: BIS Board of Directors elects Fabio Panetta, Governor of the Bank of Italy, as its new Chair Gabriel Galípolo, Governor of the Central Bank of Brazil, is appointed Chair of the meeting of Governors of major emerging market economies Michele Bullock, Governor of the Reserve Bank of Australia, is appointed Chair of the Asian Consultative Council Kazuo Ueda, Governor of the Bank of Japan, is appointed Chair of the Committee on the Global Financial System — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (bis - press releases) ; impact marché.
